title: CE-MS/MS Tutorial Dataset for MS-DIAL5
author: Kiuchi, Saki
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This dataset is used for the tutorial of ce-ms/ms data analysis in MS-DIAL5. It contains: A raw datafile ( *.raw ) of hydrophilic metabolite extraction from mouse macrophage cells aquired using Q Exactive Plus (Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc.) with vDIA (variable Data-indipendent MS/MS aquisition). Capillary electrophoresis was performed using a CE System 7100(Agilent Technologies Inc.), and an Agilent 1260 isocratic HPLC pump was used to create the sheath flow. Ouput files ( 20230208_* and AlignmentResult_20240126_18_* ) are also located in the same folder. Txt library( *.txt ) containing internal standard information and MS/MS spectral library( MSMS-Public_all-neg-VS18.msp ) for metabolite annotation are located in library folder. To reproduce the tutorial results: Load the project in MS-DIAL: Open the 2024_01_26_18_09_19.mdprject file . Please note that it is necessary that the MS-DIAL analysis output files ( 20230208_* and AlignmentResult_20240126_18_* ) are also located in the same foleder. Follow the tutorial instructions: Proceed through the tutorial steps to analyze the data and achieve the same results. Sample information: Hydrophilic metabolites were extracted from RAW264.7 cells according to previously described protocol.(Human metabolome Technologies Inc. Patent JP WO2014045932 A1)
